response.objective_caption: A young person with straight, shoulder-length reddish hair wearing a dark gray and black striped V-neck T-shirt sits on a blue couch with a subtle circular pattern. Behind them, a large deep red cushion rests against a wall, and to the left, wooden furniture legs, coiled cables, and draped fabric are visible in the background. The person faces the camera with a neutral expression, seated with arms relaxed at their sides.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young person with straight, shoulder-length reddish hair wearing a dark striped V-neck T-shirt sits on a blue patterned couch, with a large deep red cushion and wooden furniture visible behind them. Orange-yellow light leak streaks wash across the frame from the left side and upper right corner, creating analog film-style flares. The image possesses a faded, desaturated retro palette with low vibrancy and a warm overall tone that lends it a melancholic, vintage atmosphere.
